attachments.fallback: Hot to Import OLM to Office 365? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: You can easily import OLM to Office 365 using the <https://www.macsonik.com/olm/converter/|MacSonik OLM Converter Tool>. Simply install and launch the tool, add your OLM files, and select Office 365 as the saving option. After signing in with your Office 365 credentials, apply filters such as date range or duplicate removal if needed, and start the migration. The software securely imports all mailbox items — including emails, contacts, an…
